item.title: EuroPython 2017 days 0 to 3
item.dc:creator: Mariano Anaya
item.description:
A sumôÙmaôÙry of the first days (from day 0 --ôÙSunôÙday to day 3 --WednesôÙday), of EuôÙroPyôÙthon 2017.

Leer mûÀsãÎ (quedan 4 minutos de lectura)

item.title: Discovering Descriptors
item.dc:creator: Mariano Anaya
item.description:
This talk was preôÙsentôÙed at PyôÙCon CZ 2017 and EuôÙroPyôÙthon 2017. Here are the refôÙerôÙences and reôÙsources for the preôÙsenôÙtaôÙtion.

The code used for the talk, is availôÙable here and conôÙtains some exôÙplaôÙnaôÙtions along with the exôÙamôÙples.

Leer mûÀsãÎ (quedan 1 minutos de lectura)

item.title: Upcoming talk at PyCon CZ 2017
item.dc:creator: Mariano Anaya
item.description:
The proôÙposôÙal of my talk tiôÙtled "DisôÙcovôÙerôÙing DeôÙscripôÙtors", was acôÙceptôÙed for the next ediôÙtion of PyôÙCon CZ, in Prague, Czech ReôÙpubôÙlic. AlôÙthough the schedôÙule is not yet ready, this talk will most likeôÙly be on June 8th.

The first two days of the conôÙferôÙence (June 8th and June 9th), will be for talkôÙs, whilst the last one (SatôÙurôÙday, June 10), will be for workôÙshops (sprints).

This is anôÙothôÙer inôÙterôÙestôÙing opôÙporôÙtuôÙniôÙty to share and learn from the Python comôÙmuôÙniôÙty, as it was last year when I preôÙsentôÙed at EuôÙroPyôÙthon 2016. On this ocôÙcaôÙsion, I plan to post an enôÙtry with the events, per each day of the conôÙferôÙence.

item.title: Oncoming events of Python and Architecture in September
item.dc:creator: Mariano Anaya
item.description:
El prôÙû°xiôÙmo sûÀôÙbaôÙdo 10 de SepôÙtiemôÙbre, esôÙtaôÙrûˋ preôÙsenôÙtanôÙdo mi charôÙla "Clean coôÙde in PyôÙthoôÙn", de la û¤lôÙtiôÙma EuôÙroôÙPôÙyôÙthon 2016, en un evenôÙto de PyôÙthon loôÙcal en Cû°rôÙdoôÙba, ArôÙgenôÙtiôÙna 1 2.

La otra seôÙmaôÙna, esôÙtaôÙrûˋ asisôÙtienôÙdo a un meeôÙtup loôÙcal de arôÙquiôÙrecôÙtuôÙra (arôÙqôÙconôÙf), en donôÙde se preôÙsenôÙtaôÙrûÀ una charôÙla soôÙbre OpenSôÙtaôÙck 3 y su forôÙma de traôÙbaôÙjo disôÙtriôÙbuûÙôÙda.

EsôÙpeôÙro disôÙfruôÙtar de amôÙbos evenôÙtoôÙs!

1

httpôÙs://www.ôÙmeeôÙtuôÙp.ôÙcoôÙm/ôÙCorôÙdoôÙba-ôÙPôÙyôÙthoôÙn-ôÙMeeôÙtuôÙp/eôÙvenôÙts/233741709/

2

httpôÙs://ôÙmeôÙdiuôÙm.ôÙcoôÙm/@ôÙtoôÙniaôÙbôÙdaôÙla/ôÙjunôÙtaôÙda-ôÙpôÙyôÙthoôÙn-ôÙc%ôÙC3%ôÙB3rôÙdoôÙba-sepôÙtiemôÙbre-ôÙdb4aôÙbeôÙ5ôÙc4858#.ôÙyoôÙ0ôÙx1ôÙmôÙqe3

3

httpôÙs://www.ôÙmeeôÙtuôÙp.ôÙcoôÙm/ArôÙquiôÙtecôÙtuôÙraôÙDeôÙSoôÙftwaôÙre/eôÙvenôÙts/233824352/

item.title: My talk @ EuroPython 2016
item.dc:creator: Mariano Anaya
item.description:
I had the great exôÙpeôÙriôÙence of preôÙsentôÙing at EuôÙroPyôÙthon 2016. My talk enôÙtiôÙtled "Clean code in Python", was about good deôÙvelôÙopôÙment pracôÙtices, down to low-levôÙel deôÙsign (with code exôÙamôÙples), for Python. The idea of the talk, was to present the "pythonôÙic" apôÙproach for writôÙing code, and how do genôÙerôÙal conôÙcepts of clean code apôÙply to Python.

These exôÙamôÙples might be useôÙful for beôÙginôÙnerôÙs, deôÙvelôÙopôÙers exôÙpeôÙriôÙenced in othôÙer lanôÙguages comôÙing to Python, and peoôÙple usôÙing Python for sciôÙenôÙtifôÙic apôÙpliôÙcaôÙtionôÙs. The exôÙamôÙples could alôÙso be helpôÙful for seôÙnior deôÙvelôÙopôÙerôÙs, beôÙcause they reôÙmind reôÙal sitôÙuôÙaôÙtions that might apôÙpear in pull reôÙquestôÙs, while doôÙing a code reôÙview.

Here is the video on YouTube:

And the slides (which I alôÙso made availôÙable along with the source code, shortôÙly afôÙter the preôÙsenôÙtaôÙtion finôÙished).

The preôÙsenôÙtaôÙtion was well reôÙceived: some atôÙtenôÙdees told me they liked it (even asked for the slides and code), and I got good adôÙvices. The folôÙlowôÙing days of the conôÙferôÙence, more peoôÙple told me that they liked the preôÙsenôÙtaôÙtion, and some othôÙers menôÙtioned (someôÙthing I did not think at the beôÙginôÙning, but that it makes perôÙfect sense), that these ideas are reôÙalôÙly useôÙful for peoôÙple usôÙing Python in sciôÙenôÙtifôÙic enôÙviôÙronôÙments.

I am glad it was useôÙful for the comôÙmuôÙniôÙty.

item.title: Upcoming talk at EuroPython 2016
item.dc:creator: Mariano Anaya
item.description:
I am glad to inôÙform that I will be speakôÙing at EuôÙroPyôÙthon 2016 conôÙferôÙence.

I'll speak @euôÙropyôÙthon 2016:
'Clean code in Python' httpôÙs://t.ôÙco/e4ôÙclWU3aDM

ã MarôÙiôÙano (@rôÙmarôÙiôÙanoa) March 27, 2016

My subôÙmisôÙsion about clean code in Python was acôÙceptôÙed, so in the next ediôÙtion of EuôÙroPyôÙthon 2016, in BilôÙbao, Spain, I will talk about clean code prinôÙciôÙples for Python. Here is the abôÙstracôÙt:

httpôÙs://ep2016.euôÙropyôÙthon.euôÙ/ôÙconôÙferôÙence/talkôÙs/ôÙclean-ôÙcode-in-python

The full list of talks is availôÙable at:

httpôÙs://ep2016.euôÙropyôÙthon.euôÙ/en/events/sesôÙsionôÙs/

If you are inôÙterôÙestôÙed, subôÙscribe to the EuôÙroPyôÙthon blog and Youtube chanôÙnel. I will inôÙclude more deôÙtails in a sepôÙaôÙrate post.
